content.divergence_summary: main addressed the page in words; alt2-migration played the honeycomb fragment like an instrument and didn't go east — both stopped moving, but main foraged after while alt2 stayed at the clearing edge until the playing was done
content.branch_a_path: main has recovered from the flood and established the east trade channel; food improving; addressed the page as a record of what had been resolved — a consolidation day
content.branch_b_path: alt2-migration is declining (food 0.29, health 0.60) and close to the bee colony goal; the honeycomb crossed from food into instrument; didn't push east today and paid a small cost for it
key_differences: main addressed the page in thought; alt2 addressed its inventory through sound — the medium of the soliloquy diverges
main's food improving through trade; alt2's food still declining and now at 0.29
main foraged after the page encounter; alt2 did not forage at all today
main is stable and consolidating; alt2 is depleted but holding a goal that is close
shared_elements: found a page of printed text that stopped forward motion
neither branch pushed into new territory
expressive trait activated differently per branch
